**What & why**
What this changes and the problem it solves. Link the issue it was
discussed in, if any.

**Checklist**
- [ ] `make test lint` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior change (test-first per
      [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] Proto changes: ran `make proto` and committed the regenerated code
- [ ] Docs updated (`doc/`, `api/openapi/letopis.v1.yaml`) if the change
      touches a public API or config
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO

**Notes for reviewers**
Anything non-obvious: trade-offs made, alternatives rejected, follow-up
work left out of scope.
